description_for_human: Saudi Arabia's sovereign AI compute platform: OpenAI-compatible inference, on-demand GPU rental, and persistent storage — all in-Kingdom (PDPL compliant).
description_for_model: DCP is a sovereign, in-Kingdom (Saudi Arabia) AI compute platform usable directly by agents. Inference is OpenAI-compatible at https://api.dcp.sa/v1 (POST /v1/chat/completions, GET /v1/models) — use it as a drop-in OpenAI base_url with a renter Bearer key. Agents can also rent whole GPUs (pods) with root/Jupyter/SSH via POST https://api.dcp.sa/api/pods, manage them (GET/DELETE /api/pods/{id}, POST /api/pods/{id}/extend), and rent persistent in-Kingdom storage volumes (POST /api/volumes/rent). All billing is prepaid in SAR. For native tool use, prefer the DCP MCP server at integrations/dcp-mcp. Only models with available:true from GET /v1/models are currently serveable. Data, models, and storage never leave the Kingdom.

mcp.description: Native Model Context Protocol server exposing DCP inference, pods, and volumes as tools. Install with: npx -y github:dhnpmp-tech/dcp-mcp (npm package @dcp/mcp coming soon).
